:::

### Full individual trajectories

```{r setpointindfullin, message=F, warning=F}
Time_min <- 0
Time_max <- 44
Time_step <- 0.25
Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step)
print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ")
Molecule <- "EPX"

######### C1 ############################################################
l_param_name_C1 <- "kuEPX, keEPX, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_EPX_C1, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C1)

######### C1P ############################################################
l_param_name_C1P <- "kuEPX, keEPX, phi, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_EPX_C1P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C1P)

######### C2 ############################################################
l_param_name_C2 <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_EPX_C2, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C2)

######### C2P ############################################################
l_param_name_C2P <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, phi, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_EPX_C2P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_C2P)

########## Observed data ##################

dObs_ind <- df_TK_EPX |> 
  mutate(ID = as.numeric(ID))
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiEPX"] <- "CiEPX_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times"

time_limits <- dObs_ind %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  summarise(time_cutoff = max(Time, na.rm = TRUE) + 5)

Time_points_Nb_rep <- dObs_ind |> 
  dplyr::select(ID, Time_point_f, Nb_rep)

y_segment <- 750

df_phases <- dObs_ind |>
  arrange(ID, Time) |>
  group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(
    row = row_number(),
    t_start = Time,
    t_end = lead(Time),  
    segment = row,
    y = y_segment
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(t_end)) |>  
  dplyr::select(ID, segment, t_start, t_end, y, Experiment) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(
    Phase = case_when(
      (segment == 1 & ID < 65) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & ID < 65) ~ 3,
      (segment == 1 & ID > 64) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & ID > 64) ~ 2,
      (segment == 3 & ID > 64) ~ 3,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 1)~1,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 2)~3
    )
  )

```

An example of how to run the simulations for the individual trajectories is given in the bash code block below. You need to be in the right folder to launch a given model.

```{bash, results=F, eval=F}
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_EPX
pwd

for j in $(seq 1 71); do
./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint_ind_full_${j}.in
done

```

```{r EPXdatapredfull, message=F, warning=F}
##| cache: false

#nb_rows_ind_C1 <- NC_C1*N_iter_setpoint_C1+1

########## C1 #############################################

Sim.Res.ind.full_C1 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment_C1, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C1, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C1){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C1, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "CiEPX")
df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "C_exposure")


df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C1 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1 <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C1 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C1 <- df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C1 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

########## C1P #############################################

Sim.Res.ind.full_C1P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment_C1P, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C1P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C1P){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C1P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "CiEPX")
df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "C_exposure")


df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C1P <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1P <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C1P <- df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C1P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

########## C2 #############################################

Sim.Res.ind.full_C2 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment_C2, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C2, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C2){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C2, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "CiEPX")
df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "C_exposure")


df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C2 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2 <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C2 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C2 <- df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C2 %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

########## C2P #############################################

Sim.Res.ind.full_C2P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment_C2P, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C2P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C2P){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind.full_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full_C2P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX", "C_exposure")
  
  Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints)
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "Weight")
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "CiEPX")
df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "C_exposure")


df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C2P <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2P <- df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C2P <- df_mod_CeEPX_ind_C2P %>%
  left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>%
  filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID")


#########################

library(ggforce)

ID_tri <- unique(df_TK_EPX$ID)

dObs_ind_plot <- dObs_ind |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  filter(ID %in% ID_tri)|> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
    )

df_phases_plot <- subset(df_phases, ID %in% ID_tri)|> 
  left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID") |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
    )

```

::::::: panel-tabset
## C1

::: panel-tabset
## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1 <- subset(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C1, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_plot_C1 <- subset(df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C1, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1 <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiEPX_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiEPX_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_1 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1 |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_2 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1 |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiEPX_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiEPX_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()
  
```

## Internal concentrations - Log-scale

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfulllogC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

p_CiEPX_traj_log <- p_CiEPX_traj + scale_y_log10()

p_CiEPX_traj_log

```

## Weights

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataWC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Weight predictions
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullWC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_W <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = Weight_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol = 4,
  #   scales = "free"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_W

```

```{r savetrajC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred.svg", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_log.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_log.svg", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpredW.png", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpredW.svg", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_1.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_1, 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_2.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_2 , 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
```

## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullC1P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P <- subset(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C1P, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P <- subset(df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C1P, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1P <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C1P, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiEPX_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiEPX_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_1 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_2 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiEPX_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiEPX_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C1P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()
  
```

## Internal concentrations - Log-scale

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfulllogC1P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

p_CiEPX_traj_log <- p_CiEPX_traj + scale_y_log10()

p_CiEPX_traj_log

```

## Weights

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataWC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Weight predictions
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullWC1P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_W <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C1P, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = Weight_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol = 4,
  #   scales = "free"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_W

```

```{r savetrajC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred.svg", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_log.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_log.svg", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_log , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpredW.png", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpredW.svg", 
  plot=p_W , 
  width=8, height = 20, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_1.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_1, 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )

ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_comptrajpred_2.png", 
  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_2 , 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
```

## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullC2
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2 <- subset(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C2, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2 <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiEPX_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+

    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,

      ),
    linetype="dotted",

    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2,
    aes(

      ),
    color = col_EPX,

      ),

    )+

  )+
  # facet_wrap(

  #   )+

    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
```

## Internal concentrations - Normal scale

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullC2P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P <- subset(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_C2P, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P <- subset(df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_C2P, ID %in% ID_tri)
df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2P <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t_C2P, ID %in% ID_tri) |> 
  mutate(
    No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep),
    Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))),
    Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"),
    Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point))
  )

alpha_point <- 0.5
col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])

p_CiEPX_traj <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol=4,
  #   #scales = "free_x"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 300))+
  theme_minimal()
  

p_CiEPX_traj 

```

```{r, include=F}

Time_point_1 <- as.character(seq(22, 42, 1))

df_phases_plot_1 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_1 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))
dObs_ind_plot_1 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(!(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1))

df_phases_plot_2 <- df_phases_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_2 <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)
dObs_ind_plot_2 <- dObs_ind_plot |> 
  filter(Time_point_f %in% Time_point_1)

p_CiEPX_traj_1 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_1,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_CiEPX_traj_2 <- ggplot()+
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      group = ID,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +

  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot_C2P_2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      ymax= up,
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot_2,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = CiEPX_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "CiEPX (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()
  
```

## Internal concentrations - Log-scale

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfulllogC2P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

p_CiEPX_traj_log <- p_CiEPX_traj + scale_y_log10()

p_CiEPX_traj_log

```

## Weights

```{r EPXpredcurvesdataWC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Weight predictions
#| fig-label: fig-EPXdatapredfullWC2P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 20

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_W <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up,
      group = ID
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint,
      group = ID
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot_C2P, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low,
      group = ID
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  geom_point(
    data = dObs_ind_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = Weight_obs
    ),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.7,
    color = col_red
  )+
  # facet_wrap(
  #   ~ID,
  #   ncol = 4,
  #   scales = "free"
  #   )+
  facet_grid(
    vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#,
    )+
  #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p_W

```

```{r savetrajC2P, include = F}
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )

  )

  plot=p_CiEPX_traj_2 , 
  width=8, height = 10, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
```
:::
:::::::

### Simulation of the toxicodynamic in earthworms throughout the exposition

The goal here is to recreate the concentration dynamic in the average earthworm during our exposition scheme but without the fasting phase that was required for chemical analysis and during which elimination was happening.

```{r setpointin, message=F, warning=F}

Time_min <- 0
Time_max <- 42
Time_step <- 0.25
Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step)
print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ")

######## C1 ###################################
l_param_name_tot_C1 <- "kuEPX, keEPX, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiEPX"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_EPX_C1, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C1)

######## C1P ###################################
l_param_name_tot_C1P <- "kuEPX, keEPX, phi, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiEPX"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_EPX_C1P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C1P)

######## C2 ###################################
l_param_name_tot_C2 <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiEPX"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_EPX_C2, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C2)

######## C2P ###################################
l_param_name_tot_C2P <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, phi, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiEPX"
f_Setpoint(path_mod_EPX_C2P, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot_C2P)

```

```{bash, results=F, eval=F}
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_EPX
pwd
./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint.in
wait
```

```{r EPXreadSetpoint, message=F, warning=F}

############ C1 ###########################################
Sim.Res_C1 <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_EPX_C1, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))
  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiEPX_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C1), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C1[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C1 <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C1 <- subset(df_mod_C1, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiEPX_C1 <- subset(df_mod_C1, Endpt == "CiEPX_1") 

############ C1P ###########################################
Sim.Res_C1P <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_EPX_C1P, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))
  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiEPX_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C1P), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C1P[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C1P <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C1P <- subset(df_mod_C1P, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiEPX_C1P <- subset(df_mod_C1P, Endpt == "CiEPX_1")

############ C2 ###########################################
Sim.Res_C2 <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_EPX_C2, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))
  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiEPX_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C2), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C2[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C2 <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C2 <- subset(df_mod_C2, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiEPX_C2 <- subset(df_mod_C2, Endpt == "CiEPX_1") 

############ C2P ###########################################
Sim.Res_C2P <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_EPX_C2P, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t"))
  
  Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiEPX_1", "C_exposure_1")
  Nsortie = 3
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL

  for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res_C2P), fixed=FALSE )
    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res_C2P[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim)))

    }

  df_mod_C2P <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint,
    Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie))
    )
  
df_mod_Weight_C2P <- subset(df_mod_C2P, Endpt == "Weight_1")
df_mod_CiEPX_C2P <- subset(df_mod_C2P, Endpt == "CiEPX_1")
  
```

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r EPXpredcurvesC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 0.1 mg/kg of EPX. Blue points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represents the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band corresponds to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXcurvemodC1
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_CiEPX <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C1,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C1, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Internal EPX concentration (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p <- p_CiEPX 
p

```

```{r savepredcurvesC1, include = F}
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves.png", 
    plot=p, 
    width=8, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C1
    )
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves.svg", 
    plot=p, 
    width=8, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C1
    )
```

## C2

```{r EPXpredcurvesC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 0.1 mg/kg of EPX. Blue points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represents the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band corresponds to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXcurvemodC2
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_CiEPX <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Internal EPX concentration (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p <- p_CiEPX 
p

```

```{r savepredcurvesC2, include = F}
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves.png", 
    plot=p, 
    width=8, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C2
    )
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves.svg", 
    plot=p, 
    width=8, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C2
    )
```

## C2P

```{r EPXpredcurvesC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 0.1 mg/kg of EPX. Blue points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represents the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band corresponds to the credibility interval of the model. 
#| fig-label: fig-EPXcurvemodC2P
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

alpha_point <- 0.5

p_CiEPX <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= low
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= up
      ),
    linetype="dotted",
    color = col_EPX
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2P,
    aes(
      x=Time,
      y= predict.endpoint
      ),
    color = col_EPX,
    lwd=1
    )+
  geom_ribbon(
    data=df_mod_CiEPX_C2P, 
    aes(
      x=Time, 
      ymax= up, 
      ymin= low
      ),
    fill = col_EPX,
    alpha=0.1
    )+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Internal EPX concentration (ng/g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

p <- p_CiEPX 
p

```

```{r savepredcurvesC2P, include = F}
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves.png", 
    plot=p, 
    width=8, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C2P
    )
  ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves.svg", 
    plot=p, 
    width=8, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C2P
    )
    ggsave(
    filename="TK_EPX_predcurves_2.png", 
    plot=p, 
    width=5, height = 4, 
    path=path_fig_C2P
    )
```
:::
